text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
(The race is over... and I saw the<n>brilliance beyond
the clouds of dirt<n>and dust.)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
(Though the conditions and<n>environment were
different, that<n>brilliance was exactly the same.)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
(So that's it. The magnificence of<n>Umamusume
that has possessed me<n>since I was young...)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: (I have discovered its source...)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Trainer, please listen.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I figured something out after running<n>in the Japan
Dirt Derby today.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The race is over, yet Agnes Digital<n>has the same
serious expression as<n>when she was running.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Umamusume are... cute.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Umamusume are... precious.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But why are they so cute and so<n>precious? Why
do they tug at my<n>heart so?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I saw the answer today, clear as day!<n>The reason
is...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
They're always chasing after their<n>dreams with
their whole hearts!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital begins stamping her<n>feet on the
ground.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
If I could only slap my former self for<n>even
entertaining the idea that only<n>the mainstream turf
G1 races were<n>special!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Umamusume are always the same!<n>Every single
one of them is sincere.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Whether it's something they want or<n>something
they're trying to become,<n>they pursue it with all
their might.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
They compete, uplift, and push each<n>other—and no
one ever backs away<n>from a challenge.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And they know that sometimes they<n>will have fight
to be first. Yet they<n>keep looking ahead, unafraid
of that<n>clash.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Afterwards, when they've achieved<n>their goals,
they frolick and ease their<n>hearts!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
That's precisely what shakes my<n>soul and makes
me wanna fall down<n>in praise!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I thought I understood this before I<n>debuted, but
now that I've been<n>running...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's all become crystal clear!<n>Everything's on a
completely<n>different level than I'd thought—the
size of their dreams, the pain of<n>chasing them, and
the strength of<n>their bonds born along the way!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I flew into the Twinkle Series with the<n>simple
desire to see it up close, with<n>no idea how deep it
ran...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I am much too small the way I am<n>now... I can't
continue like this!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Doto and Opera O are my top two<n>oshis, and they
showed me<n>something brilliant at the Takarazuka
Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'm not fit to stand beside them as I<n>am now. I'm
not even qualified to<n>simp for them. Unless!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
As an Umamusume myself, if I can fix<n>my resolve
and stand at the starting<n>gate with a pure heart,
then...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Trainer. Do you think that I... Can I do<n>it?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
If I master the path before me, as a<n>maverick—an
all-rounder—can I<n>become worthy of standing
beside<n>Opera O and Doto?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Can I actually do it?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
There's no doubt in my mind.<n>Whatever she may
say, Agnes Digital<n>has already overcome every
trial on<n>her road to achieve what she's set<n>her
mind on.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
So long as her goal is clear, she has<n>what it takes
to traverse any road, no<n>matter how difficult.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: In that case... In that case...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I will become a proper Umamusume!<n>I'm gonna be
worthy of running<n>alongside the others with a
certified<n>license to simp!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: And so! That's why!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I'm counting on youuuu!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Her resolute voice rings out into the<n>summer sky.
For Agnes Digital, the<n>real Twinkle Series begins
now.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: With that said, let's talk about our<n>next race.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I wanna run with more experienced
runners—wonderful Umamusume who<n>can help get
me on the right track!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
More experienced runners would<n>mean those in
their senior year. With<n>Agnes Digital still in her
classic year,<n>she's asking for a rigorous
challenge.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
In that case, it would be best to<n>choose a distance
she's run already.<n>Seeing as she's run a mile
before at<n>the NHK Mile Cup...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The Mile Championship! That's the<n>race King
dominated last year!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I wanna run there too! Maybe there's<n>some
leftover speck of King's spirit<n>lingering there that I
can inherit.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And so, our next race goal is the Mile
Championship in the fall.
